mapper.sql: id, vuln_type, payload_level, payload_content, match_keywords, description, risk_level, references, enabled, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_payload_library ( vuln_type, payload_level, payload_content, match_keywords, description, risk_level, references, enabled, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{vulnType}, #{payloadLevel}, #{payloadContent}, #{matchKeywords}, #{description}, #{riskLevel}, #{references}, #{enabled}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_payload_library WHERE vuln_type = #{vulnType} AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY payload_level ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_payload_library WHERE vuln_type = #{vulnType} AND payload_level = #{payloadLevel} AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_payload_library WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY vuln_type ASC, payload_level ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_payload_library ORDER BY vuln_type ASC, payload_level ASC, create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_payload_library SET vuln_type = #{vulnType}, payload_level = #{payloadLevel}, payload_content = #{payloadContent}, match_keywords = #{matchKeywords}, description = #{description}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, references = #{references}, enabled = #{enabled}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
